sentences.english: I don't think I have enough gadgets.
I'm definitely wanting to have a few more devices to help me.
sentences.korean: 확실히 몇 개 더 갖고 싶어요.

sentences.english: Right now, I only have a regular cellphone, but I really wanted to get an iPhone.
sentences.korean: 지금은 일반 핸드폰만 있지만 정말 아이폰을 갖고 싶었어요.

sentences.english: I have essential things, like a cellphone, a computer, a camera.
sentences.korean: 핸드폰, 컴퓨터, 카메라 같은 필수적인 것만 있어요.

sentences.english: If I don't use something very often, I don't see the point of having it, so I get rid of it.
sentences.korean: 자주 안 쓰면 가지고 있을 이유가 없으니 없애요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Every time Apple releases a new product, I have to have it, so it's a little bit like an obsession for me.
sentences.korean: 애플이 새 제품을 출시할 때마다 가져야 해요. 약간 집착 같아요.

sentences.english: I avoid anything that is technical or complicated.
I find gadgets a little bit difficult to use.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
